enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog from his living room after a long Saturday of house cleaning work. He describes his day — two big houses, including one in the mountains — then talks about working on ski trail maps and plans to do more the next day (his day off).
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: committed to doing it every day
smoking heavily suppresses his appetite and makes eating difficult, requiring force-feeding
finds it engaging and feels he is making accelerating progress
